'''savaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nialamide|nialamide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nialamide|nialamide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| savaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sævæhæth|sævæhæth]] || [[word:sævæhæj|sævæhæj]] || [[word:sævæhæsh|sævæhæsh]] || [[word:sævæhæ|sævæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:savavahath|savavahath]] || [[word:savavahaj|savavahaj]] || [[word:savavahash|savavahash]] || [[word:savavaha|savavaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:savahath|savahath]] || [[word:savahaj|savahaj]] || [[word:savahash|savahash]] || [[word:savaha|savaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:savafhafth|savafhafth]] || [[word:savafhafj|savafhafj]] || [[word:savafhafsh|savafhafsh]] || [[word:savafhaf|savafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:savahatha|savahatha]] || [[word:savahaja|savahaja]] || [[word:savahasha|savahasha]] || [[word:savahaka|savahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:savahath|savahath]] || [[word:savahaj|savahaj]] || [[word:savahash|savahash]] || [[word:savaha|savaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:savahathal|savahathal]] || [[word:savahajal|savahajal]] || [[word:savahashal|savahashal]] || [[word:savahakal|savahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:savahaathatha|savahaathatha]] || [[word:savahaajaja|savahaajaja]] || [[word:savahaashasha|savahaashasha]] || [[word:savahaaka|savahaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:savahathan|savahathan]] || [[word:savahajan|savahajan]] || [[word:savahashan|savahashan]] || [[word:savahakan|savahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:savahathaoro|savahathaoro]] || [[word:savahajaoro|savahajaoro]] || [[word:savahashaoro|savahashaoro]] || [[word:savahakaoro|savahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
